ed1570b1-2554-4cc8-8197-05054724fb72.label: text_chunk
ed1570b1-2554-4cc8-8197-05054724fb72.text:
Attachment I. Non-Disclosure Agreement (Contractor)

THIS NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT (“Agreement”) is made by and between the State of Maryland (the “State”), acting by and through _______________________________________ (Issuing Agency Name) (the “Department” or “Agency” or “Authority” or “Commission”), and _____________________________________________ (the “Contractor”).

a03b661c-533a-4d53-b809-d7237357e03f.label: text_chunk
a03b661c-533a-4d53-b809-d7237357e03f.text:
RECITALS

WHEREAS , the Contractor has been awarded a contract (the “Contract”) following the solicitation for ________________________________________________________ (Solicitation Title) Solicitation # ____________________; and

19ada707-f1d3-43c9-ab17-bfcec52d0a2e.label: text_chunk
19ada707-f1d3-43c9-ab17-bfcec52d0a2e.text: WHEREAS , in order for the Contractor to perform the work required under the Contract, it will be necessary for the State at times to provide the Contractor and the Contractor’s employees, agents, and subcontractors (collectively the “Contractor’s Personnel”) with access to certain information the State deems confidential information (the “Confidential Information”).

b373b6c8-17a9-4328-90ae-eff0866e1e90.label: text_chunk
b373b6c8-17a9-4328-90ae-eff0866e1e90.text:
NOW, THEREFORE , in consideration of being given access to the Confidential Information in connection with the solicitation and the Contract, and for other good and valuable consideration, the receipt and sufficiency of which the parties acknowledge, the parties do hereby agree as follows:
1.

4bcce103-992d-45f6-ab81-4fe032130df9.label: text_chunk
4bcce103-992d-45f6-ab81-4fe032130df9.text: Regardless of the form, format, or media on or in which the Confidential Information is provided and regardless of whether any such Confidential Information is marked as such, “Confidential Information” means (1) any and all information provided by or made available by the State to the Contractor in connection with the Contract and (2) any and all personally identifiable information (PII) (including but not limited to personal information as defined in Md. Ann.

426a3af6-5ebb-4ed6-96c8-01f4769926a4.label: text_chunk
426a3af6-5ebb-4ed6-96c8-01f4769926a4.text: Code, General Provisions §4- 101(h) and Md. Ann. Code, State Govt. § 10-1301(c)) and protected health information (PHI) as defined in 45 CFR 160.103 that is provided by a person or entity to the Contractor in connection with this Contract.

cbed83c9-ae79-4f4f-bfec-fcb3b04b1d2f.label: text_chunk
cbed83c9-ae79-4f4f-bfec-fcb3b04b1d2f.text: Confidential Information includes, by way of example only, information that the Contractor views, takes notes from, copies (if the State agrees in writing to permit copying), possesses or is otherwise provided access to and use of by the State in relation to the Contract.2.

8e5d7985-eaae-47ee-8695-2ccfda0ef479.label: text_chunk
8e5d7985-eaae-47ee-8695-2ccfda0ef479.text: The Contractor shall not, without the State’s prior written consent, copy, disclose, publish, release, transfer, disseminate, use, or allow access for any purpose or in any form, any Confidential Information except for the sole and exclusive purpose of performing under the Contract.

e056dc4a-7c6d-44b2-90f5-3ce891612cd1.label: text_chunk
e056dc4a-7c6d-44b2-90f5-3ce891612cd1.text: The Contractor shall limit access to the Confidential Information to the Contractor’s Personnel who have a demonstrable need to know such Confidential Information in order to perform under the Contract and who  are bound by confidentiality obligations at least as restrictive as those set forth in this  Agreement. Contractor shall provide copies of such agreements to the State.  The names of such personnel are attached hereto and made a part hereof as Attachment  I-2 .

a525e70b-e8b5-47e0-9592-76342928c628.label: text_chunk
a525e70b-e8b5-47e0-9592-76342928c628.text:
Contractor shall update Attachment  I-2 by adding additional names (whether Contractor’s Personnel or a subcontractor’s personnel) as needed, from time to time.3. If the Contractor intends to disseminate any portion of the Confidential Information to non-employee agents who are assisting in the Contractor’s performance of the Contract or will otherwise
Attachment I – Non-Disclosure Agreement (Contractor) Page I-1
effective date:  April 17, 2018

cbae94d3-e2a2-4a6a-bfe9-8cb6918b6c72.label: text_chunk
cbae94d3-e2a2-4a6a-bfe9-8cb6918b6c72.text: have a role in performing any aspect of the Contract, the Contractor shall first obtain the written consent of the State to any such dissemination. The State may grant, deny, or condition any such consent, as it may deem appropriate in its sole and absolute subjective discretion.4.

01ba48fc-ce2a-45aa-937f-97a2a9cc6609.label: text_chunk
01ba48fc-ce2a-45aa-937f-97a2a9cc6609.text: The Contractor hereby agrees to hold the Confidential Information in trust and in strictest confidence, adopt or establish operating procedures and physical security measures, and take all other measures necessary to protect the Confidential Information from inadvertent release or disclosure to unauthorized third parties and to prevent all or any portion of the Confidential Information from falling into the public domain or into the possession of persons not bound to maintain the confidentiality of the Confidential Information.5.

7f35310b-b250-4c3d-b695-d5148ae17144.label: text_chunk
7f35310b-b250-4c3d-b695-d5148ae17144.text: The Contractor shall promptly advise the State in writing if it learns of any unauthorized use, misappropriation, or disclosure of the Confidential Information by any of the Contractor’s Personnel or the Contractor’s former Personnel. Contractor shall, at its own expense, cooperate with the State in seeking injunctive or other equitable relief against any such person(s).6.

5144cf96-5093-44b6-b7b0-ffe8f18020a0.label: text_chunk
5144cf96-5093-44b6-b7b0-ffe8f18020a0.text: The Contractor shall, at its own expense, return to the State all Confidential Information in its care, custody, control or possession upon request of the State or on termination of the Contract.7. A breach of this Agreement by the Contractor or the Contractor’s Personnel shall constitute a breach of the Contract between the Contractor and the State.8.

6832d075-bcef-44d1-8705-c8fd1baf0bd5.label: text_chunk
6832d075-bcef-44d1-8705-c8fd1baf0bd5.text: Contractor acknowledges that any failure by the Contractor or the Contractor’s Personnel to abide by the terms and conditions of use of the Confidential Information may cause irreparable harm to the State and that monetary damages may be inadequate to compensate the State for such breach. Accordingly, the Contractor agrees that the State may obtain an injunction to prevent the disclosure, copying or improper use of the Confidential Information. The Contractor consents to personal jurisdiction in the Maryland State Courts.

c7f3ea42-7e76-4d1e-8915-000c0b347fd5.label: text_chunk
c7f3ea42-7e76-4d1e-8915-000c0b347fd5.text: The State’s rights and remedies hereunder are cumulative and the State expressly reserves any and all rights, remedies, claims and actions that it may have now or in the future to protect the Confidential Information and seek damages from the Contractor and the Contractor’s Personnel for a failure to comply with the requirements of this Agreement.

8c7a8763-8b8f-48f1-a9f7-5f02c0650422.label: text_chunk
8c7a8763-8b8f-48f1-a9f7-5f02c0650422.text:
In the event the State suffers any losses, damages, liabilities, expenses, or costs (including, by way of example only, attorneys’ fees and disbursements) that are attributable, in whole or in part to any failure by the Contractor or any of the Contractor’s Personnel to comply with the requirements of this Agreement, the Contractor shall hold harmless and indemnify the State from and against any such losses, damages, liabilities, expenses, and costs.

9.

aeaa020f-f57e-4d90-a65e-e7890bae6afa.label: text_chunk

6b295588-672b-45e3-b697-3b35bc27263b.label: text_chunk

bed6e367-9149-4b50-8736-9097c6e89e3e.label: text_chunk
bed6e367-9149-4b50-8736-9097c6e89e3e.text:
The Recitals are not merely prefatory but are an integral part hereof; and

g.

 The effective date of this Agreement shall be the same as the effective date of the Agreement entered into by the parties.IN WITNESS WHEREOF , the parties have, by their duly authorized representatives, executed this Agreement as of the day and year first above written.

Attachment I – Non-Disclosure Agreement (Contractor) Page I-4
effective date:  April 17, 2018

I-3 NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT

CERTIFICATION TO ACCOMPANY RETURN OR DELETION OF CONFIDENTIAL INFORMATION

I AFFIRM THAT:


To the best of my knowledge, information, and belief, and upon due inquiry,

eb58e48d-93c1-4436-885f-fb0b048e21ba.label: text_chunk
eb58e48d-93c1-4436-885f-fb0b048e21ba.text: I hereby certify that: (i) all Confidential Information which is the subject matter of that certain Non-Disclosure Agreement by and between the State of Maryland and __________________________ (“Contractor”) dated __________________, 20_____ (“Agreement”) is attached hereto and is hereby returned to the State in accordance with the terms and conditions of the Agreement; and (ii) I am legally authorized to bind the Contractor to this affirmation.

ad08e59e-292c-4f51-b559-d714e1d0e4e4.label: text_chunk
ad08e59e-292c-4f51-b559-d714e1d0e4e4.text:
Any and all Confidential Information that was stored electronically by me has been permanently deleted from all of my systems or electronic storage devices where such Confidential Information may have been stored.

I DO SOLEMNLY DECLARE AND AFFIRM UNDER THE PENALTIES OF PERJURY THAT THE CONTENTS OF THIS AFFIDAVIT ARE TRUE AND CORRECT TO THE BEST OF MY KNOWLEDGE, INFORMATION, AND BELIEF, HAVING MADE DUE INQUIRY.

community_summary.0: The relationships involving the State of Maryland and the Contractor highlight a formal and legally binding connection characterized by a Non-Disclosure Agreement (NDA). The State of Maryland has entered into this NDA with the Contractor, which establishes a contractual relationship that mandates the Contractor to adhere to specific confidentiality terms. This agreement underscores the importance of confidentiality in their interactions, ensuring that sensitive information is protected as part of their professional engagement.
community_summary.1:
**Summary of Relationships Involving the Contractor and the State**

1. **Contract Awarding**: The Contractor has been awarded a Contract through a solicitation process, establishing a foundational relationship where the Contractor is the recipient of the contract.

2. **Governance and Obligations**: The relationship between the Contractor and the State is governed by the Contract, which outlines the obligations and rights of both parties regarding the work to be performed.

3. **Confidential Information Handling**: 
   - The Contractor receives Confidential Information from the State and is responsible for protecting this information from unauthorized disclosure.
   - The Contractor must limit access to Confidential Information to its personnel and is obligated to return such information upon request or contract termination.
   - The Contractor is also required to disseminate Confidential Information to non-employee agents involved in contract performance, but must obtain prior written consent from the State for any dissemination.

4. **Accountability and Compliance**: The Contractor has obligations to provide copies of confidentiality agreements to the State and must cooperate with the State in seeking legal remedies for unauthorized use of confidential information. Additionally, the Contractor is bound by a Non-Disclosure Agreement, which governs the handling of sensitive data.

5. **Indemnification and Legal Compliance**: The Contractor is obligated to indemnify the State against any losses or damages resulting from non-compliance with the Agreement. Furthermore, the Contractor's rights and obligations are subject to the laws and regulations established by the State.

6. **Employment of Personnel**: The Contractor employs personnel to fulfill the responsibilities defined in the Contract, ensuring that the tasks are carried out effectively.

This summary encapsulates the critical aspects of the relationships between the Contractor and the State, emphasizing the contractual obligations, the handling of confidential information, and the legal frameworks governing their interactions.
community_summary.2:
The relationships outlined involve the State and a Contractor, with a focus on their contractual obligations and the jurisdiction governing their agreement.

1. **Entities Involved**: 
   - **State**: Identified as Maryland.
   - **Contractor**: Engaged by the State for services or goods.

2. **Key Relationships**:
   - The **State provides** the **Contractor** with access to essential information necessary for fulfilling their contractual duties.
   - The **Contract** serves as the governing document that outlines the rights and responsibilities of both the **State** and the **Contractor**, particularly concerning the management of confidential information.
   - There exists a **legal agreement** between the **State** and the **Contractor**, which specifies the rights, remedies, and obligations of both parties in their professional relationship.
   - The jurisdiction for this agreement is specifically identified as **Maryland**, indicating the legal framework under which the contract operates.

In summary, the relationship between the State of Maryland and the Contractor is defined by a formal contract that ensures the Contractor has the necessary information to perform their duties, while also outlining the legal obligations and rights of both parties within the jurisdiction of Maryland.
community_summary.3:
The relationships outlined involve the concept of Confidential Information and its connection to Contracts and Electronic Storage Devices. 

1. **Confidential Information and Contract**: Confidential Information is integral to the Contract, as it indicates that the sharing of sensitive information is a key component of the contractual agreement between the involved parties.

2. **Confidential Information and Electronic Storage Devices**: Confidential Information is stored in Electronic Storage Devices, which are specialized systems designed for data storage, highlighting the importance of secure storage for sensitive data.

In summary, the relationships emphasize that Confidential Information is both a critical element of contractual agreements and is securely stored in designated electronic systems, underscoring the significance of confidentiality in legal and data management contexts.
community_summary.4: The Maryland Annotated Code (Md. Ann. Code) is a key legal document that outlines provisions related to the handling of information, particularly Protected Health Information (PHI). It serves as a reference point for legal guidelines and regulations governing the management of sensitive data. This relationship underscores the importance of the Md. Ann. Code in ensuring compliance with legal standards in information handling.
community_summary.5: The relationship between the Contractor and Attachment I-2 is characterized by the Contractor's obligation to update the document. Specifically, the Contractor is required to add names of personnel to Attachment I-2, establishing a direct and significant connection between the Contractor and the document. This highlights the Contractor's role in maintaining and ensuring the accuracy of the information contained within Attachment I-2.
community_summary.6:
**Summary of Relationships:**

- **Entities Involved:** Contractor, Contractor’s Personnel
- **Relationship Description:** The Contractor’s Personnel are employed or engaged by the Contractor to fulfill the obligations outlined in the Agreement. This indicates a formal employment relationship where the Contractor is responsible for providing personnel to meet specific contractual duties.
community_summary.7:
The relationships summarized highlight the nature of agreements, particularly focusing on Non-Disclosure Agreements (NDAs). 

1. **Agreement and Non-Disclosure Agreement**: A Non-Disclosure Agreement is identified as a specific type of legal document that is categorized under the broader term "Agreement." This emphasizes that NDAs are a subset of various agreements used in legal contexts.

2. **Parties Involved in Agreements**: The term "Agreement" signifies the involvement of parties who enter into the contract, underscoring the necessity of mutual participation in the legal framework of agreements.

In summary, the relationships illustrate that Non-Disclosure Agreements are specialized legal documents within the broader category of agreements, which necessitate the involvement of parties to be valid and enforceable.
community_summary.8:
The summary of the relationships involving the Non-Disclosure Agreement (NDA) is as follows:

1. **Non-Disclosure Agreement (NDA) and Effective Date**: The NDA has an effective date of April 17, 2018. This date marks when the terms of the agreement become applicable and legally binding.

2. **Non-Disclosure Agreement (NDA) and Contractor**: The NDA involves a Contractor, who is required to adhere to the terms of the agreement, ensuring confidentiality in their dealings.

Overall, the NDA is a crucial legal document that establishes confidentiality obligations starting from April 17, 2018, particularly involving contractors who must comply with its terms.

community_summary.17: The Disclosers have a direct relationship with the Recipient, characterized by the intention to share Confidential Information. This relationship emphasizes the trust and responsibility involved in disclosing sensitive information from one party to another.
community_summary.18:
### Summary of Relationships Involving Disclosers and Recipients

1. **Disclosers and Recipient**: The Disclosers provide confidential or commercially sensitive information to the Recipient, establishing a relationship based on trust and confidentiality. This relationship is governed by an agreement that outlines the terms of information sharing, ownership, and compliance obligations.

2. **Ownership and Control**: The Disclosers retain ownership of the Confidential Information and associated Intellectual Property Rights. They maintain control over the rights and obligations of the Recipient, who cannot transfer these rights without prior consent.

3. **Compliance and Notification**: The Disclosers require the Recipient to demonstrate compliance with confidentiality obligations and to notify them of any requests for disclosure, indicating a supervisory and communicative relationship.

4. **Affiliated Entities**: The Disclosers are associated with Group Members, indicating a shared organizational structure where information provided by the Disclosers may be utilized by these Group Members in their business activities.

5. **Entitlements and Remedies**: The Disclosers are entitled to specific remedies as outlined in the agreement in case of breaches by the Recipient, reinforcing the importance of adherence to the established terms.

Overall, the relationships highlight a structured framework of information sharing, ownership, compliance, and accountability between the Disclosers and the Recipient, with implications for affiliated entities within the same organizational context.
community_summary.19:
### Summary of Relationships Involving the Recipient and Disclosers

1. **Information Transfer**: The Recipient is set to receive Confidential Information from the Disclosers, establishing a direct dependency where the Recipient relies on the Disclosers for critical information under a legal agreement.

2. **Compliance and Responsibility**: The Recipient is responsible for ensuring that its Authorised Persons comply with the terms set by the Disclosers regarding the handling of confidential information. This includes oversight of their actions, as any unauthorized disclosure by them can lead to liability for the Recipient.

3. **Obligations and Duties**: The Recipient has several obligations towards the Disclosers:
   - To inform the Disclosers of any unauthorized access to the confidential information.
   - To assist the Disclosers in resisting any disclosure requirements, highlighting a collaborative effort to protect confidentiality.
   - To return or destroy materials containing Confidential Information upon written demand from the Disclosers.
   - To delete Confidential Information as required by the Disclosers, demonstrating a duty of care.
   - To pay all sums owed to the Disclosers under the terms of the Agreement, indicating a financial relationship.

4. **Acknowledgment of Terms**: The Recipient acknowledges the terms and conditions set forth in the Agreement, which defines its confidentiality obligations and the potential harm that breaches may cause to the Disclosers.

5. **Independence**: The Recipient does not have the authority to make commitments on behalf of the Disclosers, establishing a clear boundary of independence between the two parties.

Overall, the relationships highlight a structured framework of information sharing, compliance, and mutual obligations, with the Recipient playing a crucial role in safeguarding the confidentiality of the information provided by the Disclosers.

community_summary.22:
The summary of the relationships surrounding the Agreement is as follows:

1. **Parties Involved**: The Agreement involves one or more parties who are bound by its terms and conditions, establishing a legal relationship among them.

2. **Confidential Information**: The Agreement governs the use and protection of Confidential Information, outlining the legal framework for how such information should be handled by the parties.

3. **Binding Obligations**: The Agreement serves as a binding document for the Recipient, detailing the legal obligations and responsibilities that must be adhered to.

4. **Execution Requirement**: Each party must execute the Agreement for it to be valid, highlighting the necessity of mutual consent and commitment.

5. **Third-Party Rights**: The Agreement acknowledges the Contracts (Rights of Third Parties) Act 1999, indicating that it recognizes the rights of third parties in relation to its provisions.

6. **Governing Law**: The Agreement is governed by the laws of England and Wales, meaning that any legal interpretations or disputes will be resolved under this jurisdiction.

7. **Exclusive Jurisdiction**: The Agreement specifies that the courts of England and Wales have exclusive jurisdiction over any disputes arising from it, reinforcing the legal relationship between the document and the geographical location.

Overall, the Agreement establishes a comprehensive legal framework that binds the involved parties, protects confidential information, recognizes third-party rights, and delineates the governing laws and jurisdiction for any potential disputes.

2. **Signatory Role**: The Party acts as a signatory to the Agreement, demonstrating their commitment to the terms specified within it. This indicates a formal acknowledgment and acceptance of the Agreement's stipulations.

In summary, the relationships illustrate the Party's commitment to the Agreement through compliance and signing, while also delineating the financial responsibilities that each Party must uphold.
